body.body:
cortex.py (MEDIUM inertia — design pre-approved, refactor only, no behaviour change).

search() currently has 3 depth tiers + branching on memory_type + score weighting in one method. D233 will add spreading_activation scores on top. Abstract now before that lands.

CHANGE: introduce SearchRequest dataclass with fields: query, depth (shallow/medium/deep), seed_nodes, memory_types, threshold. search() accepts SearchRequest. All existing callers updated to construct SearchRequest inline.

SCOPE: cortex.py only. No changes to callers beyond SearchRequest construction. No behaviour change — identical results before and after.

TESTS: existing cortex tests must still pass. Add one test confirming SearchRequest with explicit depth=deep returns deeper results than depth=shallow.

FORENSIC LOGGING: none needed — pure refactor.

NOTE: D233 (T-spreading-activation-d233) should not start until this is merged.
body.title: SearchRequest dataclass for cortex.search() — before D233 lands
body.result: SearchRequest dataclass introduced for cortex.search(); accepts both legacy string and new SearchRequest interface; 8 new tests verify backwards compatibility and depth parameter preservation; all 411 tests passing
